indications.text:
NALOXONE HYDROCHLORIDE injection is indicated for use by military personnel and chemical
incident responders for:
 Emergency treatment of patients 12 years of age and older where use of high-potency opioids
such as fentanyl analogues as a chemical weapon is suspected.
 Temporary prophylaxis of res...
